label: Split CTA
description: A two-column CTA with image on one side and persuasive text with button on the other. Visually balanced for conversion. Use for product highlights, app download prompts. Layout: 50/50 split, image position configurable, stacks on mobile.

test_data.heading: Take Your Workflow to the Next Level
test_data.description: Our platform helps you build, manage, and scale your content with ease. Get started in minutes and see the difference.
